title: Coverage for road hazard liability
doc_html:
§1546. Coverage for road hazard liability

           A. The state shall become self-insured for coverage of damages resulting from the establishment, design, construction, existence, ownership, maintenance, use, extension, improvement, repair, or regulation of any state bridge, tunnel, dam, street, road, highway, or expressway. All such claims shall be administered, controlled, and adjudicated in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter.

           B. REPEALED BY ACTS 1992, NO. 385, §3.

           Acts 1988, No. 61, §1, eff. July 1, 1988; Acts 1992, No. 385, §3.
doc_text:
§1546.  Coverage for road hazard liability
A.  The state shall become self-insured for coverage of damages
resulting from the establishment, design, construction, existence, ownership,
maintenance, use, extension, improvement, repair, or regulation of any state
bridge, tunnel, dam, street, road, highway, or expressway.  All such claims
shall be administered, controlled, and adjudicated in accordance with the
provisions of this Chapter.
B.  REPEALED BY ACTS 1992, NO. 385, §3.
Acts 1988, No. 61, §1, eff. July 1, 1988; Acts 1992, No. 385, §3.
